llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Assistant Manager - Pigment and Paste
job.description: O bjectives of the Position Support the local Pigment Paste Owner in managing and executing pigment and paste-related activities in India. The role focuses on operational support, coordination, data transparency, and implementation of agreed actions across production, C-Labs, procurement, and suppliers, contributing to robust quality, cost competitiveness, and sustainable local operations. M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Support to Pigment Paste Ownership Support the local Pigment Paste Owner in day-to-day pigment and paste activities in India including root causes investigation. Prepare analyses, reports, and documentation to support decision-making within the PSM framework Operational Cross ‑ functional Coordination Support alignment of Indian pigment and paste activities with global PSM processes and standards Coordinate with production, C-Labs, procurement, and suppliers on agreed activities and follow ‑ ups Follow action items, milestone related to pigment and paste topics Pigment Paste Localization optimization (Support Role) Support pigment paste localization projects, including testing coordination, data collection, and documentation Support implementation and follow-up of agreed optimization measures together with production and lab teams Consolidation Transparency Support pigment and paste consolidation activities in India based on defined transparency frameworks Maintain and update local overviews of pigment toolbox, paste portfolio, and intermediates Identify consolidation opportunities and escalate improvement proposals to the Pigment Paste Owner EHS Compliance Support adherence to EHS requirements in labs and operational activities within the scope of responsibility Assist in audit preparation and follow-up actions to ensure compliance with BASF standards Main KPIs: #Pigment pastes in India / Sales - annual tracking R D Budget/Spend (Pigment and Paste Team India) Q-Cost (Pigment intermediates India) Safety (hsWPRIR) Job Requirements (m inimum requirement to carry out the work) Education Master degree in Chemistry or comparable discipline or equivalent education in a technical discipline W o r k in g Experience 10-15 years in a Pigment or SB - Paste or SB - Coatings related area, wide experience in Pigment surface technology, Pigment processing and manufacturing technology T e c hn i c a l Professional Knowledge/Others Knowledge of Pigments and SB - Pigment preparations, the production process of pigment preparations for SB...
